ksa_text: Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessment, future-state requirements modeling, AI workforce readiness metrics, gap analysis, and talent acquisition and development strategy formulation.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of the enterprise information technology (IT) architectural concepts and patterns to include baseline and target architectures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
